mapper.select: SELECT roomId, roomName, location, capacity, sortOrder, useYn, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM meetingRoom ORDER BY sortOrder, roomId
SELECT roomId, roomName, location, capacity, sortOrder, useYn, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM meetingRoom WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT meetingRoom_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO meetingRoom (roomId, roomName, location, capacity, sortOrder, useYn) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{sortOrder}, 'Y')
mapper.update: UPDATE meetingRoom SET roomName = #{roomName}, location = #{location}, capacity = #{capacity}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn} WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
UPDATE meetingRoom SET sortOrder = #{sortOrder} WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT equipCode FROM roomEquipment WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
SELECT photoId, roomId, oriFilename, saveFilename, sortOrder, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM roomPhoto WHERE roomId = #{roomId} ORDER BY sortOrder, photoId
mapper.insert:
SELECT roomPhoto_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO roomPhoto (photoId, roomId, oriFilename, saveFilename, sortOrder) VALUES (#{photoId}, #{roomId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingReserve WHERE roomId = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
